commit_scope: Teach the fourth-arm flattener and fkwu emitted walker the explicit substrate NodeID construction/projection floor, admit schema and tree-diff, and keep cold-cache table preparation bounded.

commands: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh schema tree-diff
local_validation.notes: Focused survey first proved schema -> 10/10 and tree-diff -> 13/13 before manifest admission. The focused fourth-arm gate returned PASS-4WAY for schema and tree-diff. Full Form validation ran with the cold-cache one-by-one fallback forced and returned 'fourth arm: 136 band(s) four-way' and '556 ok, 0 divergent'. The validate output included transient temp cleanup warnings ('rm: ... Directory not empty') but exited 0.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet. GitHub checks will be monitored after PR creation.

deploy_validation.summary: No deployment triggered by this commit. Public verification follows merge/deploy if deployment runs.

phase_gate.gate: Explicit NodeID construction/projection, schema, and tree-diff pass through Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue to the next fourth-arm residual cluster without overlapping active coord claims.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The fourth-arm floor now carries make_nodeid plus node_category/node_pkg/node_level/node_type/node_inst, preserves node_children/node_value/node_eq behavior, and captures lexical top-level constants inside defn bodies and across module-to-band source boundaries.
test_flows: schema-band validates ANY/CAT/LEAF/LIST/TUPLE acceptance and refusal cases four-way at 10.
tree-diff-band validates equal, replace, child-diff, patch, and empty-diff behavior four-way at 13.
Full form validate.sh reports 136 fourth-arm bands and 556 ok / 0 divergent across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and covered fkwu bands.
Cold-cache fourth table preparation falls back to one-by-one flattening when missing rows exceed FOURTH_PREPARE_ALL_BATCH_MAX, avoiding the all-table memory spike observed during this slice.

macos_arm64: PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=bml-hati target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=form-jit target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
PASS plane=macos-arm64 surface=form-jit-lowered target=arm64-apple-macosx object=Mach-O 64-bit object arm64
android_arm64: PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=bml-hati target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=form-jit target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
PASS plane=android-arm64 surface=form-jit-lowered target=aarch64-linux-android object=ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, ARM aarch64
macos_android_evidence.android_floor: Android remains supported at the minimum Form-native recipe/table and target-object floor in this slice. Shipping a clang-like compiler binary inside the APK remains an optional future acceleration/oracle route, not a claim made by this commit.

e2e_validation.summary: The substrate node floor raises the manifest to 136 four-way bands while preserving 556 ok / 0 divergent behavior and keeping Android evidence at the explicit Form-native minimum floor.
